description_long: This jewelry object consists of a wristwatch and two matching wristbands, all arranged above a rugged, blue-gray stone-like base. The wristwatch features a dark, likely metallic or plastic case with a rectangular face and visible gold or brass details on the dial and strap. The two wristbands are circular, dark in color, and appear to be made of a flexible material, possibly leather or rubber, with metallic fasteners. The stone base has a rough, mountainous texture and a cool blue hue, resembling carved or molded rock. The overall composition suggests a display or set, with the jewelry items presented as if on a pedestal. The design is modern and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on utility.
description: A set featuring a dark wristwatch and two matching wristbands displayed above a rugged blue-gray stone base. The jewelry is modern, functional, and minimally adorned.
description_view_0: The front view shows the wristwatch and two wristbands clearly arranged above the textured stone base, highlighting the face and details of the watch.
description_view_1: The side view compresses the jewelry into a narrow profile, with the watch and bands stacked above the stone, making the thickness of the bands and the depth of the base more apparent.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, again showing the arrangement of the watch and bands above the stone, but with less detail visible on the watch face.
description_view_3: The opposite side view is similar to view 1, showing the jewelry in a narrow vertical alignment and emphasizing the contours of the stone base.
